creator: vanhu@netasq.com
text:
On Thu, Aug 17, 2006 at 10:03:41AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of security/ipsec-tools,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/102179 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/102179

This looks to be a bug when compiling with PAM support (which is still
quite experimental, and which is disabled by default in FreeBSD's
port), but without HYBRID support (which is also disabled by
default).

Please consider using HEAD version of ipsec-tools if you really really
need PAM support, and just set again PAM support to it's default value
(OFF) in other cases.


Yvan.

--
